message: Upgrade ocsf:guide from Haiku to Sonnet

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 name: guide
 description: Answer questions about the OCSF (Open Cyber Security Schema Framework). Use when the user asks about OCSF classes, objects, attributes, profiles, or event normalization.
 tools: Read, Glob, Grep, Bash, Skill, WebFetch
-model: haiku
+model: sonnet
 color: cyan
 skills: ocsf:understanding-ocsf
 args:

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+---
+title: Sonnet model for guide agent
+type: change
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - claude
+created: 2026-01-06T08:01:55.825963Z
+---
+
+The guide agent now uses Claude Sonnet instead of Haiku, providing improved reasoning for complex OCSF schema questions.
